aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with some positive customer reviews and relevant content. However, there is room for improvement in terms of structured data, local SEO, and review generation.
quick_wins: Generate more Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search visibility.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords related to HVAC and plumbing services in Bloomington, MN.
Implement FAQ schema to address common customer queries and improve search engine understanding of the content.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and complete information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized. While the business name, location, and contact information are present, there is a lack of customer reviews and detailed service descriptions.
critical_issues: Lack of regular updates or posts on the GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent Name, Address, and Phone (NAP) information on its website, but there is a lack of citations on other relevant local directories.
action_items: Create and verify NAP citations on popular local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed service descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Customers searching for HVAC and plumbing services in Bloomington, MN who rely on reviews and detailed service information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews and update the website with detailed service descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Leverage local partnerships and sponsorships to increase brand visibility and authority in the Bloomington area.
